contacts.title: Sized for {count}+ Active Contacts

dedicated.title: Dedicated success manager

integrations.title: Custom integrations
integrations.description: Connect Simpliers with the tools your team already runs on.

sla.title: Security and SLA
sla.description: Reliable performance with a service level agreement you can plan around.

contacts.title: Monthly Up To {limit} Contacts
contacts.description: Can be used to engage with {periodName} {activePeople} through comments or DMs.

essential.title: Essential Features

noCreditCard.title: No Credit Card Required

unlock.title: Unlock All Features Anytime
unlock.description: You can unlock all features at any time.

overagePricingTable.chooseTitle: Find the plan that fits your audience
overagePricingTable.capReassurance: An overage cap keeps your bill from running away; set an upper limit and decide the maximum number of people you'll engage with. Once the limit is reached, your automations pause until the next cycle, so control always stays in your hands.
overagePricingTable.footerNote: Active Contacts are counted once per month, no matter how many times they message you. Upgrade your plan before the cycle ends and any overage for that month is waived. {link}

messages.label: Send and automate as many direct messages as your audience needs.

comments.label: Reply to every comment on your posts, with no monthly cap.

automations.label: Build as many automations as you wish, with no monthly cap.

teammates.label: Invite your whole team to collaborate on flows and inbox.

monthly.label: Rate per additional contact once you pass your plan limit.

annual.label: Same rate per additional contact when you grow past your limit.

activeContactsInfoModal.title: What is an Active Contact?
activeContactsInfoModal.intro: Billing is based on {highlight}: people who engage with you through DMs, comments, or automations during the month.
activeContactsInfoModal.countedOnce: However many times the same person messages you or comments on your posts in a single month, they always count as one contact.
activeContactsInfoModal.overageTitle: Over your limit? You stay in control.
activeContactsInfoModal.overageDescription: Your automations keep running without interruption. A small per-contact overage is added to that month's invoice for every additional Active Contact, so nothing pauses unexpectedly.
activeContactsInfoModal.overageBilling: Active Contacts reset at the start of every month, on both monthly and annual plans. Overage charges are always billed monthly.
activeContactsInfoModal.overageCapTitle: You're always in control of the limit.
activeContactsInfoModal.overageCapDescription: Every plan ships with a default overage limit, and you can adjust it any time.
activeContactsInfoModal.overageCapDescriptionSecondary: Reach the limit and your automations pause until the next cycle, so your bill never runs away from you.
activeContactsInfoModal.overageUpgrade: Upgrade your subscription before the month ends and any overage charges for that cycle are waived.

testimonials.confidenceText: {profiles} and many others used Simpliers with confidence.

contactLimit.title: Monthly Up To {limit} Contacts
contactLimit.description: Can be used to engage with {periodName} {activePeople} through comments or DMs.

unlimitedGiveaways.title: Make Unlimited Giveaways
unlimitedGiveaways.description: Make unlimited giveaways, up to {limit} entries with your account. {link}

neverMissMessage.title: Never Miss a Message
neverMissMessage.description: Manage all DMs from every account in one shared inbox. Assign, reply, and collaborate instantly. No message goes unseen.

breakLanguageBarriers.title: Break Language Barriers Effortlessly
breakLanguageBarriers.description: Instantly translate incoming and outgoing messages, allowing you to talk to anyone, anywhere. Without switching tabs or using external tools.

turnCommentsToConversations.title: Turn Comments Into Conversations
turnCommentsToConversations.description: See every comment from every post in one dashboard and respond without leaving the platform. Build stronger engagement right where it happens.

moderateSmarter.title: Moderate Smarter, Not Harder
moderateSmarter.description: Let AI analyze every comment for sentiment and intent. Automatically hide toxicity, flag questions, or reply with gratitude.

automateLikePro.title: Automate As a Pro
automateLikePro.description: Build complex automations visually. Trigger personalized replies, API actions, or data updates in minutes.

startFastWithQuickFlows.title: Start Fast with Ready-to-Use Flows
startFastWithQuickFlows.description: Launch proven engagement and response automations instantly. Choose from pre-built scenarios for giveaways, mentions, or DMs.

instantlyKnowWhatMatters.title: Instantly Know What Matters
instantlyKnowWhatMatters.description: Get notified the moment a toxic comment appears or an automation fails. React faster and protect your reputation in real time.

knowWhatWorks.title: Know What Works
knowWhatWorks.description: Get smart insights into your engagement, growth, and flow performance.

engageAuthentically.title: Engage Authentically, Even at Scale
engageAuthentically.description: Personalize every reply and DM while keeping your brand voice consistent, even when automating.

collaborateSeamlessly.title: Collaborate Seamlessly With Team
collaborateSeamlessly.description: Bring your entire team into one workspace. Assign conversations, monitor responses, and keep everyone in sync.

contactLimit.description: Can be used to engage with people through comments or DMs.

termsOfPayment.text: By subscribing to {simpliers}' services, you acknowledge and accept the following terms and conditions.

content1.title: General Provisions
texts: These subscription terms are between PE PORTAKAL ENERJİ BİLİŞİM LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ and users who choose the renewal subscription method via any page or mobile application under the https://simpliers.com website (hereinafter referred to as 'Simpliers').
Simpliers reserves the right to unilaterally amend the provisions of this agreement at any time. These changes will take effect as soon as they are published on the website.

content2.title: Subscription and Service Fees
texts: The fees for digital services and offerings under the subscription are listed on the subscriptionPricesUrl page. Simpliers reserves the right to make changes to subscription fees and services without notice.

If the user does not accept the changes in subscription fees, they have the right to cancel their subscription. Otherwise, by continuing the subscription, the user is deemed to have accepted the changes.

content3.title: Payment Terms and Methods
texts: The subscription fee is collected via the registered payment method. Payment methods may include debit card, credit card, or in-app purchases. Users can choose subscriptions via the app store or have them automatically charged from the credit card registered in their account. If payment is not made or the selected payment method is not valid, Simpliers reserves the right to suspend access to the services. It is the user’s responsibility to keep payment method information up to date.

content4.title: Service Delivery and Use
texts: The service purchased by the user is delivered electronically. The service will be made available to the user for the subscription period as soon as the payment is successfully completed. The user agrees to use the service in accordance with the applicable laws and regulations. The user is responsible for any unlawful use of the service.

The user acknowledges, declares, and undertakes not to market Simpliers’ services, which are licensed in accordance with the Turkish Copyright Law No. 5846, for commercial purposes or transfer them to third parties, and that no rights not explicitly stated in this agreement are granted to the user.

content45.title: Cancellation and Refund Policy
texts: Purchased services are considered digital content under applicable international consumer protection laws, including the European Union’s Digital Content Directive (2019/770) and the United States Federal Trade Commission regulations. Once the service delivery has commenced, it is not eligible for refunds under the right of withdrawal.
In case of faulty or incomplete service delivery, the user may contact the service provider to request a resolution.
If the user declares dissatisfaction with the service and decides to discontinue its use, refund requests will be evaluated under our Satisfaction Policy.

content5.title: Subscription Renewal and Cancellation
texts: Subscriptions are automatically renewed at the end of each term (Monthly, Quarterly, or Yearly) unless canceled by the user, and the service is extended until the end of the next term. The renewal fee is charged to the registered payment method. If the user wishes to cancel the subscription, the cancellation can be processed via the accountSubscriptionUrl page. The cancellation will take effect at the end of the current subscription period.

According to Article 15 of the Distance Sales Regulation, the user cannot exercise their right of withdrawal. In accordance with this regulation, no refunds will be made for the subscription service periods already defined. If the user does not wish for the subscription to be renewed, they must cancel the subscription before the renewal date.

content6.title: Service Suspension
texts: Simpliers reserves the right to suspend or terminate the service without prior notice in cases of non-payment, late payments, or other violations of the agreement. If the user fails to fulfill their obligations, Simpliers reserves the right to pursue legal and administrative remedies.

content7.title: Payment Methods
texts: Users are required to define one or more payment methods for subscription fee payments. If the registered payment method becomes invalid, Simpliers reserves the right to charge fees from any other registered payment method. Payment method changes can be updated in the My Account > Payments section.

content8.title: Disputes
texts: The user agrees, declares, and undertakes that in the event of disputes arising from this agreement, Simpliers’ commercial records, electronic information held in its database, and computer records will constitute binding, conclusive, and exclusive evidence and that this clause is in the nature of an evidence agreement within the meaning of Article 193 of the Turkish Code of Civil Procedure.

content9.title: Miscellaneous Provisions
texts: The invalidity, illegality, or unenforceability of any provision or statement in this agreement shall not affect the validity or enforceability of the remaining provisions.
It is the user’s responsibility to regularly check the Simpliers website for updates and information.
This agreement will be deemed accepted by the user upon purchase.
